bridges.intent: Use deterministic state to run bounded what-if checks before rollout.
Convert simulation outcomes into explicit operator-facing meaning.
Turn interpreted findings into governed updates.

regimes.notes: Feature example: staged release gates for a checkout recommendation toggle.
Workflow example: on-call incident triage and remediation loop.
Repo/system example: deterministic CI governance for a monorepo.

failureModes.risk: Overfitting to historical data blocks exploration and future performance.
failureModes.mitigation: Schedule simulation checkpoints with explicit novelty thresholds.

failureModes.risk: Offline scenarios diverge from production behavior and mislead decisions.
failureModes.mitigation: Continuously compare simulation outputs against fresh production evidence.

failureModes.risk: Narrative framing overtakes source evidence and causes policy mistakes.
failureModes.mitigation: Require evidence links for every adaptation proposal.
